label: ID.RA-01
definition: Vulnerabilities in assets are identified, validated, and recorded

label: ID.RA-02
definition: Cyber threat intelligence is received from information sharing forums and sources

label: ID.RA-03
definition: Internal and external threats to the organization are identified and recorded

label: ID.RA-04
definition: Potential impacts and likelihoods of threats exploiting vulnerabilities are identified and recorded

label: ID.RA-05
definition: Threats, vulnerabilities, likelihoods, and impacts are used to understand inherent risk and inform risk response prioritization

label: ID.RA-06
definition: Risk responses are chosen, prioritized, planned, tracked, and communicated

label: ID.RA-07
definition: Changes and exceptions are managed, assessed for risk impact, recorded, and tracked

label: ID.RA-08
definition: Processes for receiving, analyzing, and responding to vulnerability disclosures are established

label: ID.RA-09
definition: The authenticity and integrity of hardware and software are assessed prior to acquisition and use

label: ID.RA-10
definition: Critical suppliers are assessed prior to acquisition
